# Put PM25_FEM and PM25_FRM on the same row
# Save the combined table with concentrations
# Per-site regression stats (slope, intercept, R², n)
slope     = if (n() > 2) coef(lm(PM25_FEM ~ PM25_FRM))[2] else NA_real_,
intercept = if (n() > 2) coef(lm(PM25_FEM ~ PM25_FRM))[1] else NA_real_,
r2        = if (n() > 2) summary(lm(PM25_FEM ~ PM25_FRM))$r.squared else NA_real_,
